qa_pairs.question: What strategy is suggested to make the "Hello, World!" program safe from deadlocks?
qa_pairs.answer: To create a safe program, an odd-even pairing communication strategy is suggested. This involves performing communication in two steps.

qa_pairs.question: What actions do even-ranked processes perform when implementing the safe odd-even pairing communication strategy?
qa_pairs.answer: All even-ranked processes execute a send operation followed by a receive operation.

qa_pairs.question: What actions do odd-ranked processes perform when implementing the safe odd-even pairing communication strategy?
qa_pairs.answer: All odd-ranked processes execute a receive operation followed by a send operation.

qa_pairs.question: What is the benefit of using an odd-even pairing communication strategy in parallel programs?
qa_pairs.answer: The odd-even pairing strategy ensures that sends and receives are properly paired, which helps avoid any possibility of deadlock in the program.
